label: Neon Pushline Defense
description: A polished neon lane-defense game with animated HUD, impact flashes, screen shake, and glowing trails layered onto the original gameplay.

label: Echo Front TD
description: A neon three-lane tower defense where you place towers, fire shock pulses, and survive escalating enemy waves.

label: Neon Core Defense
description: Defend a neon power core across three lanes by moving your drone, building towers, and stopping escalating enemy waves.

label: Tri-Line Command
description: A three-lane command-defense game where your chosen lane empowers towers, pressure creates clickable airdrops, and low base health triggers a comeback overdrive pulse.
